calendar.matters:
Petition For Modification Of Trust Terms [Prob. Code Sec. 17200(B)(13); 15409]
Off Calendar Sep-22-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Little for Hollis Chin.

The Court stated that it does not how it can give power of appointment for tax purposes. Mr. Little argued that there is a basis issue, a gains tax issue and that tax savings is no longer an issue. The Petition for Modification of Trust Terms was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition For Modification Of Trust Terms [Prob. Code Sec. 17200(B)(13); 15409]
